articles.title: NBA Insider: Celtics, Heat are 2 teams ‘believed to intrigue’ Giannis in a blockbuster trade
articles.description:
"Boston would almost certainly have to part with Jaylen Brown in a three-team (or more) trade scenario to win The Giannis Sweepstakes."

The post NBA Insider: Celtics, Heat are 2 teams ‘believed to intrigue’ Giannis in a blockbuster trade appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics may trade Jaylen Brown to acquire Giannis Antetokounmpo.
Giannis is reportedly intrigued by both Boston and Miami as trade destinations.
A blockbuster trade could significantly alter the Celtics' championship prospects.

articles.title: Trump is setting his sights on restricting legal immigration
articles.description:
The Department of Homeland Security announced a policy requiring most immigrants seeking green cards to leave the United States while they wait long periods of time for their applications to be processed.

The post Trump is setting his sights on restricting legal immigration appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Department of Homeland Security requires immigrants to leave the U.S. during green card processing.
Policy affects thousands of Boston residents awaiting green card applications.
Increased uncertainty for families and businesses relying on immigrant workforce in Boston.

articles.title: Trump’s pressure had little effect on Iran’s terms for a peace deal
articles.description:
The contours of a deal emerging this week to end the war reflected how Trump’s pressure campaign does not appear to have decisively shifted Iran’s stance on its nuclear program.

The post Trump’s pressure had little effect on Iran’s terms for a peace deal appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Iran's nuclear program terms remain unchanged despite Trump's pressure campaign.
Negotiations for a peace deal are ongoing as of May 2026.
Local businesses may face uncertainty due to fluctuating international relations.

articles.title: Stephen Colbert is back on TV on community access in Michigan along with rocker Jack White
articles.description:
Exactly 24 hours after the last episode of “The Late Show” was broadcast, Colbert appeared on an episode of “Only in Monroe.”

The post Stephen Colbert is back on TV on community access in Michigan along with rocker Jack White appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Stephen Colbert returned to TV on May 25, 2026, in Michigan's community access show.
Colbert was joined by musician Jack White for the episode of 'Only in Monroe.'
Boston residents may miss Colbert's usual late-night humor on national platforms.

articles.title: Jim Henson’s Creature Shop opens for tours. Here’s what’s inside the once-hidden puppet studio
articles.description:
A puppet-making workshop founded by the legendary creator of the Muppets is drawing back its curtain.

The post Jim Henson’s Creature Shop opens for tours. Here’s what’s inside the once-hidden puppet studio appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jim Henson's Creature Shop now offers tours to the public starting May 2026.
Visitors can explore the iconic puppet studio, home to famous Muppets creations.
Local residents gain access to unique cultural experiences and educational opportunities.
